title: ゲームに関する実践証明

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And if that's the case, then...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Nothing... I just realized I probably shouldn't be
asking you this, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I was wondering... Hmm...
choice_data_list: I'm always happy to hear any questions.
I'm always happy to hear any questions.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. In that case, I won't hold back.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering how much you know about
games.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You see, there's a mobile game that Taishin has
been obsessed with lately.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She's been so engrossed in it that I grew short
with her and told her to give it a break. Then, it
turned into an argument.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But after reconsidering things, I felt bad for
scolding her. She never bothers me whenever I'm
deep in thought, after all...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin understands how important thinking time
is to me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't even try to see things from her
perspective.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So, back to my initial question...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: How much do you know about games?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm ashamed to admit I don't have the faintest
idea what's popular nowadays since I've never
played any.
choice_data_list: Don't worry! We can learn about them together!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you!

And so, Biwa Hayahide and I start doing research
on popular mobile games together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow. There are so many different genres
available. I don't even know where to start.

I try to think of what kind of game would suit
Biwa Hayahide's diligent and methodical
personality.
choice_data_list: How about a famous puzzle game?
How about a hardcore racing game?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've heard of this one! Maybe Taishin plays it
too!
Biwa Hayahide starts playing the puzzle game.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm, the next piece is a yellow column...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I slide this square piece to the right, it'll create
a space on the left...

She moves the puzzle pieces around with
lightning quick judgment, and her score keeps
going higher and higher.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I did it! I beat the game!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I understand now. I was a fool to disdain these
simply because they're mobile games.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! This game is actually great fun, and it helps
my focus too!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if Taishin feels the same elation when
she plays games. Hmm...

The next day, Biwa Hayahide talks to Narita
Taishin, and they have a great time playing the
puzzle game together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm pretty sure Taishin was playing something
like this!
Biwa Hayahide starts playing the racing game.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ah! I have to turn! No, no! Not that way!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hey! That's not fair! You can't just crash into me
like that!

Biwa Hayahide tilts her body this way and that as
she steers her race car around.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I can see how Taishin might get sucked into this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You must calculate your acceleration and max
speed based on the course layout, all while
watching out for your opponents.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'd get pretty mad too if someone started
lecturing me while I was in the middle of an
intense race...

The next day, Biwa Hayahide apologizes to
Narita Taishin, and they have fun playing the
racing game together.
